intro: Platyspermum alatum, also known as the Australian celery top, is a plant species native to Australia, characterized by its celery-like foliage and small white flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, contributing to its potential in treating various health conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and infections.
